metadata.description: Single benchmark-eligible, authoritative USC package with engine-required source-backed quantity evidence.
metadata.name: Mobi Golden Set v1 authoritative release gate
metadata.notes: Authoritative four-document USC Longstreet Theatre package: project manual, drawings, Addendum One, and Addendum Two. The release gate measures nine current engine trade lanes and requires deterministic reproduction of one explicit drawing dimension: the 4 FT temporary emergency-egress-gate nominal width on A001. The quantity is sub-scope-only, source-evidenced, and human-review-required; it is not a whole-project fence takeoff or gate count.

projects.addenda_completeness_method: Authoritative archived USC solicitation H27-Z147-B explicitly lists the project manual, drawings, Addendum One, and Addendum Number Two; both retrieved addenda include their stated enclosures.
ground_truth_scope_notes: Source text identifies the project as Longstreet Theatre Exterior Restoration issued for bidding.
Table of contents includes Division 03 / 033000 Cast-In-Place Concrete.
Source text includes painting scope such as painting disturbed areas and Division 09 painting/coatings content.

Golden Set v1 maps painting/coatings scope to the current engine generic `finishes` lane and cast-in-place concrete scope to the `concrete` lane; dedicated painting/demo_concrete extraction provider outputs are not the scoring target for this real-corpus run.
Sheet A001 explicitly labels a 4 FT temporary emergency egress gate; the engine quantity must remain blocked for human review and must not infer total fence length or gate count.
key_exclusions: No customer-facing estimate or pricing use
No total temporary-fence length or gate count asserted
key_inclusions: Complete archived USC core bid package: project manual, drawings, Addendum One, and Addendum Two
Civil work associated with underground drainage/downspouts

assumptions: One explicit sub-scope dimension only; repeated callouts and total gate count remain human-review items.
key_quantities.item_name: Temporary emergency egress gate nominal width
key_quantities.label: emergency egress gate
key_quantities.measurement_method: Deterministic source-text extraction of the explicit nominal gate width on A001; no fence length or gate count inferred.

projects.quantity_notes: Release benchmark requires the engine to emit the explicit 4 FT temporary emergency-egress-gate width from sheet A001. This is a source dimension, not a whole-project fence takeoff or gate count.
projects.title: Longstreet Theatre Exterior Restoration - Authoritative Drawings Package
